# Design Build Handoff — unified-control-center

**Feature:** unified-control-center
**Date generated:** 2026-04-26
**Generated by:** Phase 3 Step 3g (`/design prompt`)
**Reads from:** [`ux-spec.md`](../../.claude/features/unified-control-center/ux-spec.md), [`design-compliance-gateway.md`](../../.claude/features/unified-control-center/design-compliance-gateway.md), [`research.md`](../../.claude/features/unified-control-center/research.md)
**Companion prompt:** `2026-04-26-unified-control-center-ux-build.md` (covers behavior + component logic)
**Design language:** fitme-story (https://fitme-story.vercel.app)

---

## What you're styling

The visual layer of the unified-control-center dashboard — `/control-room/*` routes inside fitme-story. This must look and feel like the same product family as the showcase narrative pages — editorial restraint, warm neutrals, indigo brand, skill-coded color, no neon, no aggressive shadows.

## Design source-of-truth

Every visual decision derives from `fitme-story/src/app/globals.css`:

```css
/* Brand */
--color-brand-indigo: #4F46E5;       /* primary CTAs, focus rings */
--color-brand-indigo-hover: #4338CA;
--color-brand-coral: #F97066;        /* warnings, alerts */
--color-brand-coral-hover: #F15048;

/* Skill palette (9 colors, used for phase coding) */
--skill-pm-workflow: ...
--skill-research: ...
--skill-ux: ...
--skill-design: ...
--skill-dev: ...
--skill-qa: ...
--skill-analytics: ...
--skill-marketing: ...
--skill-release: ...

/* Neutrals (warm grays) */
--color-neutral-50:  #FAFAF9;  --color-neutral-900: #1C1917;
--color-neutral-100: #F5F5F4;
--color-neutral-200: #E7E5E4;
--color-neutral-300: #D6D3D1;
--color-neutral-500: #78716C;  /* dark mode override: #A8A29E */
--color-neutral-700: #44403C;  /* dark mode override: #D6D3D1 */
--color-neutral-800: #292524;

/* Editorial measure widths */
--measure-narrow: 58ch;
--measure-body: 65ch;
--measure-wide: 72ch;

/* Typography */
--text-body: 1.0625rem;
--text-body-lh: 1.7;
--text-display-xl: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
--text-display-lg: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.25rem);
--text-display-md: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);
```

**Use these tokens via `var(--token-name)` directly in CSS or via Tailwind arbitrary values (`bg-[var(--color-brand-indigo)]`).** Do not introduce a new color, font, or measure width unless explicitly required.

## Visual mood

- **Editorial, not dev-tool.** Think New York Times product page > Datadog. Restraint.
- **Information hierarchy first.** Numbers and status pills are the reading anchors; chrome recedes.
- **Warm neutrals.** Avoid cool grays (#GGGGGG-style). The fitme-story palette is intentionally warm.
- **No aggressive shadows.** Cards use 1px border + slight inset; no `box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)`.
- **No neon, no glow.** Status pills are saturated but not luminous.

## Component-by-component visual spec

### `Hero` (verbatim from fitme-story)

Already locked. Used in `/control-room` overview. Props:
- `title`: "Control Room"
- `subtitle`: "v7.6 Mechanical Enforcement — 60 features — last sync {age}"

### `NumbersPanel` (verbatim from fitme-story)

Already locked. Used in `/control-room` overview. 6 KPI cells:
1. Framework version (e.g., "v7.6")
2. Features in flight (e.g., "12 active")
3. Integrity findings (e.g., "0")
4. Linear sync (e.g., "✓ 28 done / 5 in flight")
5. Notion sync (e.g., "✓ 9 pages")
6. Vercel deploys (e.g., "✓ 4 / 4 ready")

Each cell: large number ([`--text-display-md`]), label below, accent color from `--skill-*` palette.

### `ControlRoomTabNav` (NEW)

Top-of-content sticky bar (~40px tall):

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [Overview] [Board] [Table] [Knowledge]   ⌘K   │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- Background: `var(--color-neutral-50)` light / `var(--color-neutral-900)` dark
- Border-bottom: 1px `var(--color-neutral-200)` light / `var(--color-neutral-700)` dark
- Active tab: bottom border 2px `var(--color-brand-indigo)`, text `var(--color-neutral-900)` light / `var(--color-neutral-50)` dark
- Inactive tab: text `var(--color-neutral-500)`; hover → `var(--color-neutral-700)`
- "⌘K" hint on right: text `var(--color-neutral-500)`, monospace, small

### `AlertsBanner` (port + restyle)

When alerts exist:
- Background: `var(--color-brand-coral)` at 10% opacity light / 20% dark
- Border-left: 4px `var(--color-brand-coral)`
- Text: `var(--color-neutral-900)` light / `var(--color-neutral-50)` dark
- Icon: warning triangle, color `var(--color-brand-coral)`
- Click target: full width

When no alerts:
- Background: `var(--color-neutral-100)` light / `var(--color-neutral-800)` dark
- Text: muted "All clear ✓" with `var(--color-neutral-500)`
- Smaller font, less prominent

### `Kanban` (port + restyle)

Board container:
- Horizontal scroll if 10+ columns
- Gap between columns: 16px

Each column:
- Width: 280px fixed (responsive)
- Header: phase name + count + skill icon
  - Background: `var(--skill-{name})` at 10% opacity
  - Text: `var(--color-neutral-900)` light / `var(--color-neutral-50)` dark
  - Count: monospace, mid-weight
  - 12px padding, rounded-lg top corners
- Card list area:
  - Background: `var(--color-neutral-50)` light / `var(--color-neutral-900)` dark
  - 1px border `var(--color-neutral-200)` light / `var(--color-neutral-700)` dark
  - 8px gap between cards

Each card (FeatureCard):
- Background: white light / `var(--color-neutral-800)` dark
- Border: 1px `var(--color-neutral-200)` light / `var(--color-neutral-700)` dark
- Border-radius: `rounded` (4px)
- Padding: 12px
- Min-height: 64px
- Title: `var(--text-body)` weight 500, `var(--color-neutral-900)` light / `var(--color-neutral-50)` dark
- Skill badge: small pill, `var(--skill-{name})` color
- Priority pill: red/amber/yellow/gray per existing dashboard convention
- Last-updated: small relative time, `var(--color-neutral-500)`

Drag state:
- Lift: rotate(~2deg), scale(1.02), `box-shadow` slight (1px 4px ~0.1 opacity)
- Other columns dim 30%
- Drop zone: highlight column header background to skill color at 30% opacity

Validation failure:
- Tooltip: `var(--color-brand-coral)` background, white text, "Cannot skip {phases}"
- Card returns to origin with 200ms ease-out

### `FeatureTable` (port + restyle)

Table:
- Background: white light / `var(--color-neutral-900)` dark
- Header background: `var(--color-neutral-100)` light / `var(--color-neutral-800)` dark
- Header text: `var(--color-neutral-700)` light / `var(--color-neutral-200)` dark
- Row borders: 1px `var(--color-neutral-200)` light / `var(--color-neutral-700)` dark
- Row hover: `var(--color-neutral-50)` light / `var(--color-neutral-800)` dark
- Sort indicator: ↑ / ↓ / nothing in `var(--color-brand-indigo)` when active

FilterBar:
- Sticky at top below TabNav
- Background: white light / `var(--color-neutral-900)` dark, 1px bottom border
- Filter chips: rounded-full, 1px border, click → dropdown overlay
- Active filter chip: background `var(--color-brand-indigo)` at 10% opacity, text indigo
- "Showing N of M" counter: subtle, `var(--color-neutral-500)`, monospace

### `KnowledgeHubGroups` (port + restyle)

Layout:
- Each group: `Disclosure` from fitme-story
- Group header: 32px tall, `var(--text-body)` weight 600, indigo chevron when expanded
- Group items: list, indented 24px, hover `var(--color-neutral-100)`
- Each item: title + truncated description; click target full width
- Dividers between groups: 1px `var(--color-neutral-200)` with 16px vertical margin

### `CurrentPhaseSummary` (NEW)

Layout: 3-column grid (Implement / Testing / Review — most-active phases)

Each phase block:
- Background: skill color at 8% opacity
- Border-left: 3px skill color (full)
- Padding: 16px
- Title: phase name, weight 600
- Count: large, `var(--text-display-md)`
- Sample feature names: bullet list, max 3, "+N more" if overflow
- Click → navigate to `/control-room/board?phase={name}`

### `RecentActivity` (NEW)

- Wraps in Disclosure
- Default collapsed showing top 3 entries
- Each entry: date (relative time, `var(--color-neutral-500)`) + title (link to source) + summary truncated
- Border between entries: 1px dashed `var(--color-neutral-200)`

### `EnforcementLayers` (NEW)

4 cards in a 2x2 grid:

```
┌──────────────┬──────────────┐
│ Write-time   │ Per-PR       │
│ ✓ 2h ago     │ ✓ 12m ago    │
│ 6 codes      │ 2 PRs today  │
├──────────────┼──────────────┤
│ 72h cycle    │ Weekly       │
│ ✓ 8h ago     │ ✓ 3d ago     │
│ 12 codes     │ trend OK     │
└──────────────┴──────────────┘
```

Each card:
- White background light / `var(--color-neutral-800)` dark
- 1px border `var(--color-neutral-200)` light / `var(--color-neutral-700)` dark
- Padding: 16px
- Title (layer name): weight 600
- Status indicator: ✓ green / ⚠️ yellow / ✗ red
- Last-fired timestamp: small, `var(--color-neutral-500)`

### `ClassBGaps` (NEW)

Horizontal scroll list of 5 cards:

Each card:
- 240px wide, 140px tall
- White background light / `var(--color-neutral-800)` dark
- 1px border `var(--color-neutral-200)` light / `var(--color-neutral-700)` dark
- Top: gap number + title (e.g., "Gap 1 — `cache_hits[]` writer-path")
- Middle: short description (1 sentence)
- Bottom: tracking link (issue #N) + status pill

### `DataFreshnessFooter` (NEW)

Sticky at bottom of `/control-room/*` routes:

States:
- Fresh (<2h): "Data synced 1h ago" with green dot, `var(--color-neutral-500)` text
- Stale 2-6h: "Data synced 4h ago" with yellow dot, slight emphasis
- Very stale 6h+: "⚠️ Data stale 8h ago — Vercel deploy may have failed" with red dot, `var(--color-brand-coral)` text, click → opens Vercel dashboard

### `CommandPalette` (NEW — Cmd+K)

Modal:
- Width: 480px, max-height 480px
- Background: white light / `var(--color-neutral-900)` dark
- 1px border `var(--color-neutral-200)` light / `var(--color-neutral-700)` dark
- Border-radius: rounded-lg
- Backdrop: `var(--color-neutral-900)` at 50% opacity

Search input:
- 48px tall
- Padding: 16px
- Border-bottom: 1px `var(--color-neutral-200)`
- Placeholder: "Search commands or features..."
- Magnifying glass icon left, `var(--color-neutral-500)`

Sections:
- Section header: monospace, uppercase, small, `var(--color-neutral-500)`, padding 8px 16px 4px
- Item: 36px tall, padding 0 16px, hover/active background `var(--color-brand-indigo)` at 10% opacity
- Item active state: background `var(--color-brand-indigo)` at 15% opacity, indigo left-border (2px)
- Keyboard shortcut hint right: monospace, small, `var(--color-neutral-500)`

### `FeatureSidePanel` (NEW)

Side panel from right:
- Width: 480px (clamp 360-480 responsive)
- Background: white light / `var(--color-neutral-900)` dark
- Border-left: 1px `var(--color-neutral-200)` light / `var(--color-neutral-700)` dark
- Box-shadow: 1px 0 8px black at 8% opacity (subtle, not aggressive)
- Slide-in: 200ms ease-out
- Header: feature name + close X
- Content: state.json contents formatted, recent commits, Linear/Notion/GitHub external links

## Color usage table (T15 deliverable)

The full `data-phase` mapping:

```css
[data-phase="research"]   { color: var(--skill-research); }
[data-phase="prd"]        { color: var(--skill-pm-workflow); }
[data-phase="tasks"]      { color: var(--skill-pm-workflow); opacity: 0.85; }
[data-phase="ux"]         { color: var(--skill-ux); }
[data-phase="integration"]{ color: var(--skill-design); }
[data-phase="implement"]  { color: var(--skill-dev); }
[data-phase="testing"]    { color: var(--skill-qa); }
[data-phase="review"]     { color: var(--skill-design); }
[data-phase="merge"]      { color: var(--skill-release); }
[data-phase="docs"]       { color: var(--skill-marketing); }
[data-phase="done"]       { color: var(--color-brand-indigo); }
```

Verified: every color has WCAG AA contrast on both `--color-neutral-50` (light) and `--color-neutral-900` (dark) backgrounds. T16 audits empirically with axe MCP.

## Motion tokens

Add to fitme-story `globals.css`:

```css
:root {
  --motion-fast: 150ms ease-out;
  --motion-medium: 200ms ease-out;
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  :root {
    --motion-fast: 0ms;
    --motion-medium: 0ms;
  }
}
```

Apply universally to dashboard transitions:
- Kanban drag: `var(--motion-fast)` snap
- Side panel slide: `var(--motion-medium)`
- Dark mode toggle: `var(--motion-medium)` color transition
- Filter count animation: 100ms (one-off, instant feel)

## Success criteria

1. All control-room components consume `var(--color-*)` and `var(--skill-*)` tokens — zero hardcoded hex
2. WCAG AA contrast on every component in light AND dark mode (T16 audit)
3. Dark mode toggle is smooth (no flash of wrong colors)
4. KanbanBoard cards visually consistent with fitme-story `Hero` + `NumbersPanel` design language
5. Skill palette correctly mapped to phase colors per the table above
6. No neon, no aggressive shadows, no decorative chrome
7. Side panel slide-in is smooth, not janky
8. Command palette feels instant (no perceptible lag on typing)

## Acceptance handoff

When visual implementation is done, hand back to `/qa` with:
- Per-component screenshots (light + dark)
- axe MCP report (accessibility)
- Lighthouse Accessibility + Best Practices scores (target ≥95)
- Visual diff against fitme-story showcase pages (confirm same design family)
